summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Verdura. All 18 backend pytest tests passed (auth, suitability, zones, AI species via Claude Sonnet 4.5, plantings auth+counter, community CRUD, likes, stats). Frontend e2e via Playwright: landing, auth login (demo@verdura.app), map with Leaflet + click analysis panel (NDVI/soil/canopy/water/legal), AI species recommendation rendered with climate + Neem, community page with posts and stats, profile page — all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Pydantic EmailStr is used; fine. Suitability is deterministic mock (md5-seeded) — already disclosed as MOCKED.
JWT_SECRET default 'change-me' fallback — production should require explicit secret (currently set in .env).
compute_suitability runs synchronously inside async route — fine for fast deterministic math, no IO.
AI species endpoint catches all exceptions and falls back to a static list; good resilience but failures are silent to clients (only logged).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_post community post and a planting via fresh registered TEST_ user during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 18 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py pass against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend flows verified end-to-end including Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI species call (~10s). Satellite/legal data is MOCKED deterministically — expected per PRD.
